skill.name: maxhub-kuaishou
skill.description: 快手全场景数据查询助手。支持App和Web双端API，覆盖视频详情、用户数据、搜索、热榜、直播、评论等全功能。
skill.summary: Kuaishou data assistant that queries video details, user profiles, trending content, and search results via the MaxHub API.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 135 potential issues across 7 files (609 lines). The vast majority are false positives from API documentation and README files (example IDs misidentified as cryptographic keys, documentation URLs flagged as reconnaissance). The confirmed risks are expected behavior for an API client skill: executing curl commands with an API key environment variable and making network requests to the MaxHub API at aconfig.cn. This is a legitimate Kuaishou data assistant with no evidence of malicious intent, data exfiltration, or prompt injection.

medium_findings.title: AI-Instructed Shell Command Execution with API Key
medium_findings.description: SKILL.md instructs the AI assistant to execute curl commands using the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable. The AI is told to read the API key from the environment and pass it as an Authorization header to network requests. This is a legitimate pattern for an API client skill but represents elevated risk due to the combination of code execution, credential access, and network calls.

medium_findings.title: API Key Environment Variable Usage
medium_findings.description: SKILL.md declares MAXHUB_API_KEY as a required sensitive environment variable and instructs the AI to read it for API authentication. The key is passed as a Bearer token in Authorization headers. This is expected for an API client but the credential is accessible to shell commands executed by the AI.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded API URLs in Documentation
low_findings.description: Documentation and reference files contain hardcoded URLs pointing to aconfig.cn and Kuaishou domains. These are legitimate references to the API provider and example Kuaishou content links. No risk of data exfiltration.

low_findings.title: Misidentified Cryptographic Keys in API Examples
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged example user IDs and video IDs (e.g., '3xz63mn6fngqtiq', '3xhpk3xcf6e4iac') as weak cryptographic algorithms. These are legitimate Kuaishou platform content identifiers used as API documentation examples, not cryptographic materials.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Examples in README Documentation
low_findings.description: README files contain shell command examples (npx, curl) in code blocks. These are documentation for human users about installation and setup, not instructions for AI execution.

low_findings.title: API Parameter Documentation Flagged as Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Reference files contain documented API parameters with example values like user IDs and share links. Static analyzer flagged these as system reconnaissance, but they are legitimate API documentation for developers.

dangerous_patterns.title: Combined Shell Execution, Credential Access, and Network Requests
dangerous_patterns.description: SKILL.md instructs the AI to execute curl shell commands that read the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable and send it as a Bearer token in HTTP requests to external API endpoints. While this is legitimate API client behavior, the combination of three risk factors (external_commands, env_access, network) requires careful monitoring to ensure the credential is not sent to unauthorized destinations.

content.user_title: Query Kuaishou Data Via the MaxHub API
content.value_statement: Data analysts and marketers need fast access to Kuaishou platform insights but lack reliable API tools. This skill solves that by providing a unified interface to query Kuaishou video, user, trending, and search data through the MaxHub API.
actual_capabilities: Fetch Kuaishou video details and comments using video IDs or share links
Look up user profiles, follower counts, and published video lists
Search for content with filters by publish time, popularity, and category
Retrieve trending and hot lists across multiple categories
Access live stream information and replay data
Batch query up to 40 videos in a single API request
limitations: Requires a valid MAXHUB_API_KEY from aconfig.cn to function
API rate limits apply and may restrict high-frequency queries
Some endpoints may be unstable due to Kuaishou platform risk controls
Data freshness depends on the third-party API cache and may have delays

use_cases.title: Content Trend Analysis
use_cases.description: Marketing teams can analyze trending Kuaishou content by fetching hot lists, reviewing video engagement data, and identifying popular content patterns.
use_cases.target_user: Content marketers and social media analysts

use_cases.title: User Research for Market Insights
use_cases.description: Product researchers can gather user profile data, follower statistics, and content preferences to understand audience behavior on Kuaishou.

use_cases.title: Competitive Video Monitoring
use_cases.description: Brand teams can track competitor video performance, comment sentiment, and publishing patterns to inform their content strategy.

prompt_templates.title: Get a Single Video Details
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the details for the Kuaishou video at this link: https://v.kuaishou.com/cNYP0Z
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to look up basic info about a specific Kuaishou video they found.

prompt_templates.title: Look Up a Kuaishou User Profile
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the user profile for this Kuaishou profile: https://www.kuaishou.com/profile/3xz63mn6fngqtiq. Show me their follower count, total videos, and bio.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to research a specific Kuaishou creator profile statistics.

prompt_templates.title: Analyze Trending Content
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the current Kuaishou hot list and analyze the top 10 trending videos. Show me what categories are most popular and summarize the common themes.
prompt_templates.scenario: Content strategist wants to understand what is trending on Kuaishou right now.

prompt_templates.title: Comprehensive Creator Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Do a full analysis of this Kuaishou creator: get their user info, list their recent videos, and analyze their top 3 posts by engagement. Compare their content style with trending content on the hot list.
prompt_templates.scenario: Brand team wants to evaluate a potential creator partnership with data-driven insights.

output_examples.input: What is trending on Kuaishou today?
output_examples.output:

1. Entertainment - 45.2M views - A dance challenge by top creator @LiXiao
2. Comedy - 38.7M views - Skit about daily office life
3. Food - 32.1M views - Street food tour in Chengdu
4. Sports - 28.5M views - Basketball trick shots compilation
5. Music - 25.3M views - Original song going viral

User Profile Summary:

output_examples.input: Search for electric vehicle content on Kuaishou
output_examples.output:
Search results for 'electric vehicle':
Found 3,450 related videos.

Top Results:
1. BYD new model review - 2.1M views - 3 days ago
2. Tesla vs Nio comparison - 1.8M views - 1 week ago
3. EV charging guide for beginners - 950K views - 5 days ago

Filters applied: All time, sorted by relevance.

best_practices: Confirm the API key is configured before making queries to avoid authentication errors.
Use specific search filters like time range and category to narrow down results and get relevant data.
Batch related queries together to minimize API calls and work within rate limits.
anti_patterns: Making individual API calls for each video in a list instead of using the batch endpoint to query up to 40 videos at once.
Asking for raw API response data instead of requesting a human-readable summary with key insights.
Repeatedly requesting a single endpoint without checking for rate limiting or error responses first.

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need to register at aconfig.cn, create an API key in your dashboard, and set it as the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable.

faq.question: What kind of data can I query from Kuaishou?
faq.answer: You can query video details, user profiles, comments, trending lists, search results, and live stream data through the MaxHub API.

faq.question: Does this skill support both English and Chinese?
faq.answer: Yes. Responses match your input language. Chinese users get numbers in wan format, English users get K/M/B format.

faq.question: Are there any rate limits on API requests?
faq.answer: Yes. The MaxHub API enforces rate limits. If you receive a 429 error, wait before making more requests.

faq.question: Can I search for specific types of content on Kuaishou?
faq.answer: Yes. You can search with keywords and filter by publish time, sort order, video duration, and search scope for precise results.

faq.question: Is the data from this API real-time or cached?
faq.answer: The API may return cached data for frequently requested endpoints. Some endpoints have delays due to platform risk controls.
